Hero.intro: Hi, I’m <name>SharkLian</name>, a Senior Frontend Developer & React/Next.js Expert based in Taiwan. I specialize in building high-performance <react>React</react> applications and scalable web architectures, delivering custom solutions that drive business growth. With <nest>NestJS</nest> full-stack capabilities, I ensure seamless API integration.
Hero.philosophy: My approach combines clean code with premium web design. Whether crafting pixel-perfect interfaces with <tailwind>Tailwind CSS</tailwind> or developing complex enterprise dashboards using <antd>Ant Design</antd> & <mui>MUI</mui>, I focus on SEO, accessibility, and exceptional user experience (UX).

annotation.title: Interactive Annotation Interfaces
annotation.desc: Precise 2D image labeling tools (Canvas/SVG) for AI workflows.

admin.title: Enterprise Admin Panels
admin.desc: Streamlining data workflows and permission management.

Hero.closing: My coding style is like a shark—clean, efficient, and precise. If you need a robust internal tool, I deliver solutions that work.
Hero.rwd_capability: Expert in Responsive Design Templates (Desktop · Tablet · Mobile)

annotation.title: Image Annotation Platform
annotation.desc: A professional-grade image annotation tool designed for AI and computer vision workflows. Features drag-and-drop batch upload, precision labeling tools, and an intuitive dark-mode interface optimized for extended use.

intelligence.title: Shark Intelligence
intelligence.desc: A dual-mode retail platform featuring Customer Mode for shopping and checkout, plus Manager Mode with a War Room for real-time analytics and inventory management. Includes dark/light theme and multi-language support.
